chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Theft

text: 5098 - رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: "لاَ يَزَالُ اَلْعَبْدُ يَسْرِقُ حَتَّى إِذَا اِسْتَوْفَى دِيَةَ يَدِهِ أَظْهَرَهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَيْهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5098 - It is narrated from Abu Al-Hasan Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as)  that he said:
"A servant continues to steal until, when the value of what he has stolen equals the blood money for his hand, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, exposes him."
